title: psychotria portus-finschii
intro: Psychotria portus-finschii, also known as Finsch's wild coffee, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is native to Papua New Guinea and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Psychotria portus-finschii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into a tea or infusion, or used as a tincture, to harness its medicinal properties.
